source.title: JSON endpoint · Cloudflare Browser Rendering docs

summary: The /json endpoint is for AI-assisted typed structured extraction from rendered pages. The key lever is response_format, especially json_schema, so the caller describes the desired output shape instead of scraping raw selectors by hand.

purpose: Use /json when the goal is typed structured data extraction rather than raw DOM capture.
It is the Browser Rendering path recommended in the overview for AI-powered data extraction.
schemaPattern: Provide a JSON schema describing the typed object you want returned.
Example docs pattern: an object with a products array, where each item can require fields like name and optionally link.
practicalNotes: This endpoint trades explicit selector logic for prompt/schema-driven typed extraction.
If the output shape matters, define it tightly in response_format instead of trusting a vague schema.

cleaning.notes: The available targeted source exposed schema usage more clearly than full prose. This file captures the usable contract honestly and stops there.
